title: Call of the Night
body:
**Call of the Night lets you be a vampire, have a new gameplay and use vampire abilities!**

## Becoming a vampire
With a 25% chance of becoming a vampire the first time you join the world. Also, if you are not a vampire, but one of the players on the server is a vampire, using the "Vampirism: Turn into Vampire" ability can turn you into a vampire!

## Vampires' abilities
As a vampire you have the following abilities available to you:

- Better night vision
  
- Faster speed
  
- More resistance
  
- Higher jumps
  
- More strength

- Vampirism: Bite - lets you to bite a villager or player if you press RMB on villager or player after using this ability. The bite will replenish your hunger and health.
  
- Vampirism: Punch - explosive attack that deals a lot of damage to the area in front of you.
  
- Vampirism: Turn into Vampire - if you press RMB on player after using this ability, he will turn into a vampire if he is not already a vampire.

## Vampires' features
However, as a vampire, you will burn under day sky whether you have fire resistance or not.
